---
title: ""
pagetitle: "`r contrast`"
output: 
  html_document:
    mathjax: null
    self_contained: true
params:
  contrast: NULL
  DAList: NULL
  width: 1000
  height: 1000
  display.columns: ["uniprot_id", "Protein.Description"]
  grouping_column: NULL
  status.cols: ["#00bfff", "#858585", "#ff3030"]
  sample.cols: NULL
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo = F, include = F}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = F, message = F, fig.align = "center", echo = F, cache = F)
```

```{css, echo=FALSE}
.main-container {
  max-width: 1000px;
  margin-left: auto;
  margin-right: auto;
}
```

```{r logo, fig.align="left", out.width="40%"}
knitr::include_graphics(path = "/Users/sbyrum/Documents/github/proteoDAstjude/inst/report_templates/CPM_Hz.png", rel_path = F)
```

### `r stringr::str_replace(contrast, "_vs_", " vs ")` 

```{r glimma, results = "asis", fig.keep='none', echo=FALSE}

model_data <- params$DAList$results[[params$contrast]]

uams_glimmaXY(
  DAList = params$DAList, 
  contrast = params$contrast,
  grouping_column = params$grouping_column,
  sample.cols = params$sample.cols,
  status.cols = params$status.cols,
  display.columns = params$display.columns,
  width = params$width,
  height = params$height
)

```


```{r}
to_html_table <- function(dataframe) {
 htmltools::tags$table(
  htmltools::tags$thead(htmltools::tags$tr(htmltools::tags$td(" ", style = "text-align:left;"), lapply(colnames(dataframe), function(x) htmltools::tags$th(htmltools::HTML(paste0("&nbsp;&nbsp;"), x), style = "text-align:right;")))),
  htmltools::tags$tbody(
   lapply(1:nrow(dataframe), function(x) {htmltools::tags$tr(htmltools::tags$td(rownames(dataframe)[x], style = "text-align:left;"), lapply(dataframe[x,], function(y) htmltools::tags$td(y, style = "text-align:right;")))})
  ))
}
```

```{r}
# Get contrast matrix,
# ignoring when no contrast matrix
#
# Get contrast matrix from correct location based on per-contrast filtering
# Decide contrast matrix source based on presence of per-contrast filtering
if (!is.null(params$DAList$filtered_proteins_per_contrast)) {
  this_contrast_matrix <- as.data.frame(params$DAList$eBayes_fit[[params$contrast]]$contrasts)
} else {
  this_contrast_matrix <- as.data.frame(params$DAList$design$contrast_matrix)[params$contrast, , drop = FALSE]
}

```


```{r, results='hold'}
htmltools::tags$br()
htmltools::tags$br()
htmltools::tags$br()
htmltools::tags$details(
  htmltools::tags$summary("Model details"),
  htmltools::tags$br(),
  htmltools::tags$strong("Model equation: "),
  paste(deparse(design), collapse = ""),
  htmltools::tags$br(), 
  htmltools::tags$strong("Design matrix:"),
  htmltools::tags$br(),
  to_html_table(params$DAList$eBayes_fit[[contrast]]$design),
  htmltools::tags$br(),
  htmltools::tags$strong("Contrast for this report:"),
  htmltools::tags$br(),
  to_html_table(this_contrast_matrix))
htmltools::tags$br()
htmltools::tags$br()
htmltools::tags$br()
```
